tracks.meaning: a document or file containing information about a person, event, or transaction that is kept for reference or evidence
a collection of data or information stored in a database or file system
to write down or register something in an official document or list
to track or follow the course or progress of something or someone
a single song or piece of music on an album or recording
official documentation of legal proceedings, evidence, or testimony in a court case
a documented account of a patient's medical history and treatment
an account or entry documenting a financial transaction or business dealing
the number of offences or violations attributed to a person or entity
the best or fastest performance achieved by a person or team in a competition
a duration of time measured or documented for a performance or achievement
one's reputation, track record, or pattern of behaviour over time
to make an official statement or announcement in a formal setting
to capture or store audio or video content in digital or analog format
